QRGeneratorIntroMessage: Halkan waxaad ku abuuri kartaa QR code gaar ah oo loogu talagalay gaari kasta. Adigoo gelinaya xogta aasaasiga ah ee gaariga, QR code waa la abuuri karaa, la soo dejisan karaa oo la daabici karaa. QR code-ka waxaa lagu dhejin karaa gudaha gaariga si darawalladu ay ugu sawiraan iyagoo adeegsanaya app-ka Mobile-TAG marka ay dhacdo xaalad. Tani waxay fududeynaysaa helitaanka iyo diiwaangelinta xogta muhiimka ah ee gaariga iyada oo aan loo baahnayn gelin gacanta ah. Astaantan waa bilaash in la isticmaalo waxayna faa’iido u leedahay milkiilayaasha gaadiidka gaarka ah, shirkadaha kirada, fleet-yada leasing-ka iyo hawl-wadeennada saadka. Qaybaha lagu calaamadeeyay casaanka waa qasab. Fadlan hubi in xogta la geliyay ay sax tahay.
QRGeneratorTest: Haddii aad rabto oo keliya inaad tijaabiso abuuraha QR code, waxaad geli kartaa xog tusaale ah ama tijaabo ah halkii aad ka gelin lahayd xog dhab ah. Tani waxay kuu oggolaanaysaa inaad aragto sida ay u shaqeyso ka hor inta aadan u isticmaalin xogta dhabta ah ee gaariga.
QRGeneratorDocument: Dokumeentiga uu abuuro Mobile-TAG waxaa lagu ilaaliyaa furaha sirta ah ee fudud si loo yareeyo khatarta gelitaanka aan la oggolayn.
QRGeneratorScan: QR codes-ka ay abuurtay Mobile-TAG waxaa loogu talagalay in si toos ah loogu sawiro gudaha app-ka Mobile-TAG. Maadaama koodhku uu ka kooban yahay xog qaabaysan oo la ilaaliyay oo ku saabsan gaariga, wuxuu u muuqan karaa mid aan la akhrin karin ama aan caddeyn marka lagu sawiro scanner QR caadi ah. Tani waxay hubinaysaa in xogta si sax ah loogu raro dokumeentiga dhacdada ee Mobile-TAG.
QRGeneratorMailSendInfo: Marka cinwaannada iimaylka lagu geliyo foomka ee milkiilaha gaariga iyo shirkadda caymiska, app-ka Mobile-TAG wuxuu si toos ah u soo qaadi karaa cinwaannadan marka darawalku doorto inuu wadaago dokumeentiga.
QRGeneratorMailSendInfoPrefilled: Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay in cinwaannada iimaylka ee milkiilaha gaariga iyo shirkadda caymiska si toos ah loogu buuxiyo sidii qaataayaal fariinta iimaylka.
QRGeneratorMailSendInfoEmpty: Haddii meelahan laga tago madhan, darawalku waa inuu gacanta ku geliyo cinwaannada iimaylka marka uu wadaagayo dokumeentiga.
QRGeneratorInstallText: Ku rakib Mobile-TAG taleefankaaga oo ku hay la socda apps-kaaga caymiska. Haddii ay dhacdo shil yar oo gaadiid, waxaad horey u haysataa qalab fudud oo aad si cad ugu diiwaangeliso xaaladda.
QRGeneratorPrepareText: Is diyaari ka hor inta aysan dhicin xaalad
QRGeneratorAvailableText: Waxaa laga heli karaa App Store iyo Google Play
qrGroup: Haddii baabuurtaadu ay isticmaalaan bixiyeyaasha caymiska ee kala duwan, tixgeli inaad abuurto koodhadh QR oo kala duwan koox kasta.
redFields: Meelaha cas waa in la buuxiyaa si loo sameeyo koodhka QR
qrGenerationTitle: Isticmaal hal koodh QR gaadhi kasta — ama hal koodh QR oo loogu talagalay dhammaan gaadiidkaaga.
qrGenerationMessage: Dooro sida aad u rabto inaad u abuurto koodhkaaga QR:
qrGenerationOne: Koodh QR oo gaar u ah gaadhiga. Hore ayaa loogu buuxiyey xogta gaadhiga — darawalku uma baahna inuu geliyo wax xog ah.
qrGenerationTwo: Koodh QR oo loogu talagalay gaadiid badan. Ka tag meelaha gaadhiga madhan (lagu calaamadeeyey buluug) si aad u abuurto hal koodh QR oo loogu talagalay dhammaan gaadiidka. Darawalku wuxuu xogta ku gelin doonaa app-ka.
documentLanguage: Beddelidda luqadda foomka ma saameyso dukumeentiga kama dambaysta ah.
qrLink: Koodhka QR wuxuu ka kooban yahay xiriir toos ah oo lagu soo dejin karo app-ka Mobile-TAG ee Google Play iyo App Store. Ku dhiirrigeli darawallada inay horay u rakibaan app-ka si uu diyaar ugu ahaado isticmaal degdeg ah haddii ay dhacdo dhacdo.
VBownertax: Caymiska ma ku soo celin karaa VAT-ka baabuurka?
vehicleOwnerId: Aqoonsiga ama lambarka ururka ee mulkiilaha baabuurka
vehicleInsuranceCarrierDamage: Baabuurku ma leeyahay caymis dhammaystiran oo dabooli kara dhammaan waxyeelada?
vehicleInsuranceGreenValid: haddii lagu daro kaarka cagaaran (muddada ansaxnimada)
vehicleRegistrationCity: haddii ay khusayso, magaalada/gobolka uu gaadhigu ka diiwaangashan yahay
